page.title: Notification Settings
page.subtitle: Manage system alerts and communication integrations.

sample.title: Shift Coverage Alert
sample.body: Warehouse Zone B is below minimum coverage for the upcoming night shift.

smtp.title: SMTP Email
smtp.subtitle: Outgoing email for candidate notifications and interview invites

toasts.missingDesc: Host, Username, and From Email are required.

sms.title: SMS Gateway Plugins
sms.subtitle: Install a plugin to connect any SMS provider without changing your app.
sms.selectPrompt: Select a plugin to configure it.

installPanel.title: Install New Plugin
installPanel.subtitle: Upload or paste a plugin JSON file. Download an example above to get started.
installPanel.varsTitle: Built-in variables available in any plugin config
installPanel.varsCredHint: Credential keys (e.g. <0>{{senderId}}</0>) are also available after configuration.

configurePanel.successTitle: Accepted by gateway — message is queued for delivery.
configurePanel.warnDelivery: If you did not receive the SMS, verify your Sender ID is approved in GoInfinito and the recipient number is correct.

delete.title: Remove Plugin?
delete.body: This will permanently remove the plugin and its saved credentials. You can re-install it at any time.

toasts.activatedDesc: {{name}} is now the active SMS gateway.

vars.coding: Always 8 (UCS-2) — GoInfinito v2 only accepts this value; UCS-2 handles both Arabic and Latin
vars.unicode: "1" for Arabic/non-Latin content, "0" for plain Latin
